targets.query: SELECT mean(temperature_c) FROM weather..weather_observations WHERE $timeFilter AND station =~ /^$station$/ GROUP BY time($__interval), station fill(null)
SELECT mean(relative_humidity_percent) FROM weather..weather_observations WHERE $timeFilter AND station =~ /^$station$/ GROUP BY time($__interval), station fill(null)
SELECT mean(wind_speed_kmh) FROM weather..weather_observations WHERE $timeFilter AND station =~ /^$station$/ GROUP BY time($__interval), station fill(null)

SELECT last(time) AS last_seen, last(temperature_c) AS temperature_c, last(relative_humidity_percent) AS humidity_percent, last(wind_speed_kmh) AS wind_speed_kmh, last(barometric_pressure_pa) AS pressure_pa FROM weather..weather_observations WHERE $timeFilter AND station =~ /^$station$/ GROUP BY station
